canonical_lifecycle_note: V1 local-deterministic model. External runtime lifecycle (/session → /continuity → /authority → /compile) is SEQUENCED for post-V1. governed_files_hash provides repo-verifiable content binding. Owner workflow_dispatch provides explicit authorization.
intent: Authorize Phase 1 tombstoning of legacy root helpers and active governance inventory reconciliation: registry.js, compile-decision.js, mindshift_bundle_generator.sh, decision.json fixture-only classification, and REPO_EXECUTION_MAP topology visibility update. No Cloudflare deploy or D1 migration governance changes.
